mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = #{tableName}

SELECT
`${column}`
FROM `${tableName}` WHERE `student_id` = #{studentId} AND `delete_flag` = '1'
ORDER BY is_primary DESC, curriculum_system_code ASC
ORDER BY curriculum_system_code ASC, gpa_scope_code ASC, student_academic_curriculum_gpa_id ASC
ORDER BY school_year_label DESC, term_code ASC, student_academic_us_high_school_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY al_subject_id ASC, stage_code ASC, is_predicted ASC, exam_series ASC
ORDER BY year_taken DESC, ap_course_id ASC, student_academic_ap_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY ib_subject_id ASC, level_code ASC, is_predicted ASC
ORDER BY chs_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY school_year_label DESC, term_code ASC, course_name_text ASC, student_academic_ossd_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY curriculum_system_code ASC, school_year_label DESC, term_code ASC, subject_name_text ASC, student_academic_other_curriculum_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC, student_standardized_sat_id DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC, student_standardized_act_id DESC
ORDER BY start_time DESC, end_time DESC, student_activity_experience_id DESC
ORDER BY start_time DESC, end_time DESC, student_enterprise_internship_id DESC
ORDER BY student_research_experience_id DESC
ORDER BY competition_year DESC, competition_name ASC, student_competition_record_id DESC
SELECT `${valueColumn}` AS value, `${labelCnColumn}` AS label_cn, `${labelEnColumn}` AS label_en FROM `${tableName}` WHERE `delete_flag` = '1' ORDER BY value ASC

SELECT student_language_test_record_id, student_id, test_type_code, status_code, test_date, exam_name_text, total_score, score_scale_text, cefr_level_code, evidence_level_code, is_best_score, notes FROM student_language_test_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC, student_language_test_record_id DESC

SELECT item.student_language_test_score_item_id, item.student_language_test_record_id, item.score_item_code, item.score_value, item.score_scale_text FROM student_language_test_score_item item INNER JOIN student_language_test_record record ON record.student_language_test_record_id = item.student_language_test_record_id WHERE record.student_id = #{studentId} AND record.delete_flag = '1' AND item.delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY record.test_date DESC, record.student_language_test_record_id DESC, item.score_item_code ASC, item.student_language_test_score_item_id ASC
SELECT test_type_code AS value, test_type_name_cn AS label_cn, test_type_name_en AS label_en FROM dict_language_test_type WHERE delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, test_type_code ASC
SELECT score_item_code AS value, score_item_name_cn AS label_cn, score_item_name_en AS label_en FROM dict_language_test_score_item WHERE delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, score_item_code ASC

SELECT attachment.student_activity_attachment_id, attachment.student_activity_experience_id, attachment.file_name, attachment.file_url, attachment.file_key, attachment.sort_order FROM student_activity_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_activity_experience experience ON experience.student_activity_experience_id = attachment.student_activity_experience_id WHERE experience.student_id = #{studentId} AND experience.delete_flag = '1' AND attachment.delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY experience.start_time DESC, experience.student_activity_experience_id DESC, attachment.sort_order ASC, attachment.student_activity_attachment_id ASC

SELECT attachment.student_enterprise_internship_attachment_id, attachment.student_enterprise_internship_id, attachment.file_name, attachment.file_url, attachment.file_key, attachment.sort_order FROM student_enterprise_internship_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_enterprise_internship internship ON internship.student_enterprise_internship_id = attachment.student_enterprise_internship_id WHERE internship.student_id = #{studentId} AND internship.delete_flag = '1' AND attachment.delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY internship.start_time DESC, internship.student_enterprise_internship_id DESC, attachment.sort_order ASC, attachment.student_enterprise_internship_attachment_id ASC

SELECT attachment.student_research_attachment_id, attachment.student_research_experience_id, attachment.file_name, attachment.file_url, attachment.file_key, attachment.sort_order FROM student_research_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_research_experience experience ON experience.student_research_experience_id = attachment.student_research_experience_id WHERE experience.student_id = #{studentId} AND experience.delete_flag = '1' AND attachment.delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY experience.student_research_experience_id DESC, attachment.sort_order ASC, attachment.student_research_attachment_id ASC

SELECT attachment.student_competition_attachment_id, attachment.student_competition_record_id, attachment.file_name, attachment.file_url, attachment.file_key, attachment.sort_order FROM student_competition_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_competition_record record ON record.student_competition_record_id = attachment.student_competition_record_id WHERE record.student_id = #{studentId} AND record.delete_flag = '1' AND attachment.delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY record.competition_year DESC, record.student_competition_record_id DESC, attachment.sort_order ASC, attachment.student_competition_attachment_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE student_language_test_score_item item INNER JOIN student_language_test_record record ON record.student_language_test_record_id = item.student_language_test_record_id SET item.delete_flag = '0', item.update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE record.student_id = #{studentId} AND item.delete_flag = '1'
UPDATE student_language_test_record SET delete_flag = '0', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1'

UPDATE student_activity_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_activity_experience experience ON experience.student_activity_experience_id = attachment.student_activity_experience_id SET attachment.delete_flag = '0', attachment.update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE experience.student_id = #{studentId} AND attachment.delete_flag = '1'

UPDATE student_enterprise_internship_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_enterprise_internship internship ON internship.student_enterprise_internship_id = attachment.student_enterprise_internship_id SET attachment.delete_flag = '0', attachment.update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE internship.student_id = #{studentId} AND attachment.delete_flag = '1'

UPDATE student_research_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_research_experience experience ON experience.student_research_experience_id = attachment.student_research_experience_id SET attachment.delete_flag = '0', attachment.update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE experience.student_id = #{studentId} AND attachment.delete_flag = '1'

UPDATE student_competition_attachment attachment INNER JOIN student_competition_record record ON record.student_competition_record_id = attachment.student_competition_record_id SET attachment.delete_flag = '0', attachment.update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE record.student_id = #{studentId} AND attachment.delete_flag = '1'
UPDATE `${tableName}` SET delete_flag = '0', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM student_language WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_language ( student_language_id, student_id, use_best_single_test, prefer_scored_over_estimated, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{studentLanguageId}, #{studentId}, 1, 1, '1' )

INSERT INTO student_language_test_record ( student_id, test_type_code, status_code, test_date, exam_name_text, total_score, score_scale_text, cefr_level_code, evidence_level_code, is_best_score, notes, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{testTypeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{testDate}, #{examNameText}, #{totalScore}, #{scoreScaleText}, #{cefrLevelCode}, #{evidenceLevelCode}, #{isBestScore}, #{notes}, '1' )

INSERT INTO student_language_test_score_item ( student_language_test_record_id, score_item_code, score_value, score_scale_text, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{studentLanguageTestRecordId}, #{scoreItemCode}, #{scoreValue}, #{scoreScaleText}, '1' )
